known_issues: Vendor approval is not working as expected

existing_features.title: Fix the frontend vendor approval flow so that the ApprovalDashboard correctly calls the approve/reject backend mutations, handles success and error states with toast notifications, and refreshes the approval list after an action.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix the vendor approval backend logic so that when an admin approves a vendor via the ApprovalDashboard, the vendor's approval status is correctly updated in the backend state and persisted across calls.
